text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I wonder where that kitty is off to in such a
hurry...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Maybe if I follow it, I'll be led on a grand
adventure. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it fell asleep... Well, so much for my
adventure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond continues searching for a new
adventure but comes up empty-handed.
